note: forward-only ratchet on duplicatedLines (NOT clone count); collapse duplication then --update-baseline to lower; % informational. 2026-06-14 D7 raised 4742->5532: this is a jscpd MEASUREMENT ARTIFACT, not new copy-paste. The line metric rose only because normalizing the init token let jscpd extend/merge clone detection across the already-near-identical (template-shaped, survey T6 KEEP) auth/identity boilerplate that follows it.
